news.title:
Syngene International schedules a virtual one-to-one meeting with Alquity on March 18, 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be disclosed; details available on Syngene's website.
news.summary:
Syngene International schedules a virtual one-to-one meeting with Alquity on March 18, 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information will be disclosed; details available on Syngene's website.

news.title:
Syngene Intl reports Feb exports at $6.6M, down 22% YoY.
Exports show a 32% MoM decline from January 2023.
news.summary:
Syngene Intl reports Feb exports at $6.6M, down 22% YoY.
Exports show a 32% MoM decline from January 2023.

news.title:
Syngene International announces an analyst/investor meeting on Feb 23, 2026.
Meeting with Renaissance Investment Managers will be virtual, no UPSI will be disclosed.
news.summary:
Syngene International announces an analyst/investor meeting on Feb 23, 2026.
Meeting with Renaissance Investment Managers will be virtual, no UPSI will be disclosed.

news.title:
Syngene International received a Rs. 25.5 crore tax refund for AY 2014-15.
Karnataka HC ruled in favor of Syngene for AY 2010-13, with no penalties imposed.
news.summary:
Syngene International received a Rs. 25.5 crore tax refund for AY 2014-15.
Karnataka HC ruled in favor of Syngene for AY 2010-13, with no penalties imposed.

news.title:
Syngene Intl's tax appeals for AYs 2013-14, 2014-15, and 2017-18 partially allowed by NFAC.
Company anticipates reduced contingent liability and refund eligibility with no serious financial impact.
news.summary:
Syngene Intl's tax appeals for AYs 2013-14, 2014-15, and 2017-18 partially allowed by NFAC.
Company anticipates reduced contingent liability and refund eligibility with no serious financial impact.

news.title:
SynGene International Ltd. saw a block trade of ~1,211,404 shares at Rs. 453.25.
The total value of the trade amounted to Rs. 54.9 crores.
news.summary:
SynGene International Ltd. saw a block trade of ~1,211,404 shares at Rs. 453.25.

news.title:
Syngene Intl to meet investors/analysts on Feb 10-11, 2026 in Mumbai.
No UPSI will be disclosed; details available on Syngene's website.
news.summary:

news.title:
Syngene International schedules an analyst/investor meet on Feb 2, 2026.
The virtual one-on-one meeting with J.P. Morgan will disclose no UPSI.
news.summary:
Syngene International schedules an analyst/investor meet on Feb 2, 2026.
The virtual one-on-one meeting with J.P. Morgan will disclose no UPSI.

news.title: Syngene International shares fell 15% over two sessions, hitting a 5-year low.
news.summary: Syngene International shares fell 15% over two sessions, hitting a 5-year low.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs cuts Syngene's target price but keeps a Buy rating.
Short-term margin challenges expected; gradual recovery anticipated.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs cuts Syngene's target price but keeps a Buy rating.
Short-term margin challenges expected; gradual recovery anticipated.

news.title:
Syngene focuses on chemistry-led research for growth despite Q3 FY26 revenue impact due to inventory correction and client issues.
MD CEO Peter Bains highlights rising demand for integrated chemistry capabilities, positioning Syngene as a long-term partner.
news.summary:
Syngene focuses on chemistry-led research for growth despite Q3 FY26 revenue impact due to inventory correction and client issues.
MD CEO Peter Bains highlights rising demand for integrated chemistry capabilities, positioning Syngene as a long-term partner.

news.title:
Syngene International cuts FY26 revenue guidance by 3-5% due to Librela inventory correction.
CFO Deepak Jain cites ongoing inventory adjustments for veterinary drug Librela as key reason.
news.summary:
Syngene International cuts FY26 revenue guidance by 3-5% due to Librela inventory correction.
CFO Deepak Jain cites ongoing inventory adjustments for veterinary drug Librela as key reason.

news.title:
Syngene lowers its guidance due to the impact of losing a key product.
This loss is expected to weigh on the company's growth trajectory.
news.summary:
Syngene lowers its guidance due to the impact of losing a key product.
This loss is expected to weigh on the company's growth trajectory.

news.title:
Syngene International revises FY26 revenue forecast to a 2-3% decline.
Earlier, the company had projected mid-single-digit growth for FY26.
news.summary:
Syngene International revises FY26 revenue forecast to a 2-3% decline.
Earlier, the company had projected mid-single-digit growth for FY26.

news.title:
Syngene's Q3 PAT drops 44% YoY to ₹73 cr due to biologics client impact.
Excluding ₹58 cr one-time impact from gratuity provision changes, PAT stands adjusted.
news.summary:
Syngene's Q3 PAT drops 44% YoY to ₹73 cr due to biologics client impact.
Excluding ₹58 cr one-time impact from gratuity provision changes, PAT stands adjusted.

news.title:
Syngene International's Q3 PBT fell to ₹990M from ₹1.8B YoY.
An exceptional item of ₹706M impacted Syngene's Q3 results.
news.summary:
Syngene International's Q3 PBT fell to ₹990M from ₹1.8B YoY.
An exceptional item of ₹706M impacted Syngene's Q3 results.

news.title:
Syngene's 9M revenue grew 3% YoY to Rs. 2702 Cr; Q3 revenue fell 3% YoY to Rs. 917 Cr.
Q3 EBITDA down 26%, PAT down 44% YoY; partnership with BMS extended till 2035.
news.summary:
Syngene's 9M revenue grew 3% YoY to Rs. 2702 Cr; Q3 revenue fell 3% YoY to Rs. 917 Cr.
Q3 EBITDA down 26%, PAT down 44% YoY; partnership with BMS extended till 2035.

news.title:
Syngene International hit a 2-year low as Q3 net profit plunged 89%.
The profit slump in Q3FY26 was attributed to changes in labour law.
news.summary:
Syngene International hit a 2-year low as Q3 net profit plunged 89%.
The profit slump in Q3FY26 was attributed to changes in labour law.

news.title:
Syngene extends its Bristol Myers Squibb partnership till 2035, enhancing drug development collaboration and BBRC services in Bengaluru.
Macquarie maintains 'outperform' on Syngene with ₹835 target, indicating 28% upside; stock trades at ₹627, down 4.1% in a month.
news.summary:
Syngene extends its Bristol Myers Squibb partnership till 2035, enhancing drug development collaboration and BBRC services in Bengaluru.
Macquarie maintains 'outperform' on Syngene with ₹835 target, indicating 28% upside; stock trades at ₹627, down 4.1% in a month.

news.title:
Syngene International extends research partnership with Bristol Myers Squibb until 2035.
The collaboration emphasizes their continued efforts in the pharmaceutical sector.
news.summary:
Syngene International extends research partnership with Bristol Myers Squibb until 2035.
The collaboration emphasizes their continued efforts in the pharmaceutical sector.
